scripts.build:android:preview: npm run validate:release:preview && eas build --platform android --profile preview
scripts.build:android:production: npm run validate:release:production && eas build --platform android --profile production
scripts.build:ios:preview: npm run validate:release:preview && eas build --platform ios --profile preview
scripts.build:ios:production: npm run validate:release:production && eas build --platform ios --profile production
